name: Barbecued Fish
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb firm, white fish fillets (such as Red Snapper or Halibut)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all sauce ingredients in a pot. Place over medium heat and boil until reduced to a thin syrup.
2. Pour the syrup through a strainer, discard the cooked ingredients, and chill the syrup.
3. Place fish steaks or fillets in a baking dish and spoon some syrup over each piece.
4. Marinate in the refrigerator for 1 hour.
5. Cook the fish on a hot grill, basting with a teaspoon of barbecue syrup on each side.
